comments.body: Automation rule is added with the action "Set Default Service Point for PostNord" which is why the customer selected service point is overridden during label generation.
comments.html_body: Automation rule is added with the action "Set Default Service Point for PostNord" which is why the customer selected service point is overridden during label generation.
comments.plain_body: Automation rule is added with the action "Set Default Service Point for PostNord" which is why the customer selected service point is overridden during label generation.

comments.body:
Hello VILENIUS,

We have identified the cause of this issue. There is an automation rule in the app configured with the action "Set Default Service Point for PostNord", which automatically overrides the service point selected by your customer during checkout and replaces it with the nearest one.

To fix this, please follow these steps:

1. In the app, go to Settings > Automation > Setup.
2. Find the rule that contains the "Set Default Service Point for PostNord" action.
3. Remove that specific action from the rule (or delete the rule entirely if it was created solely for this purpose).
4. Save the changes.

Once this automation action is removed, the app will use the service point your customer selected at checkout when generating the label.

Please test it on a new order and let us know if you need any further assistance.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello VILENIUS,
 
We have identified the cause of this issue. There is an automation rule in the app configured with the action "Set Default Service Point for PostNord", which automatically overrides the service point selected by your customer during checkout and replaces it with the nearest one.
 
To fix this, please follow these steps:
 
1. In the app, go to Settings > Automation > Setup.
2. Find the rule that contains the "Set Default Service Point for PostNord" action.
3. Remove that specific action from the rule (or delete the rule entirely if it was created solely for this purpose).
4. Save the changes.
 
Once this automation action is removed, the app will use the service point your customer selected at checkout when generating the label.
 
Please test it on a new order and let us know if you need any further assistance. 
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

-Oskari

comments.plain_body:
Hi!
  
  Will it still choose the closest one if customer doesn't choose a location

comments.body:
Hello Oskari,

Yes, when a customer does not select a service point at checkout, the app will automatically select the nearest PostNord service point and use it for label generation. So you do not need to worry about those orders — they will still work seamlessly.

To summarize the behavior after removing that automation action:
1. If a customer selects a service point at checkout, the app will use that specific location.
2. If a customer does not select one, the app will automatically fall back to the nearest service point.


Please test it on a few orders and let us know if everything is working as expected.

Thanks and regards,
Sibi
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Oskari,
 
Yes, when a customer does not select a service point at checkout, the app will automatically select the nearest PostNord service point and use it for label generation. So you do not need to worry about those orders — they will still work seamlessly.
 
To summarize the behavior after removing that automation action:
  1. If a customer selects a service point at checkout, the app will use that specific location.
  2. If a customer does not select one, the app will automatically fall back to the nearest service point.
 
Please test it on a few orders and let us know if everything is working as expected.
 
Thanks and regards,
Sibi
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Oskari,

We have re-enabled the default service point option under the automation setup rule to select the nearest service point. Please proceed with processing the orders.

Regarding your initial query, even though the default service point option is enabled, the customer-selected service point should still be prioritized. If this is not happening, please share the order number where the customer selected a service point but the app selected a different service point. Kindly do not generate the label for that order until we review it.

Also, for us to investigate the case and review the logs, we need the Shopify collaborator access request to be approved. We have sent the request to oskari@maustemesta.com.
You can approve it by navigating to: Shopify Settings > Users > Pending Requests > Approve request from info@pluginhive.com

Looking forward to your acknowledgment.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Oskari,
 
We have re-enabled the default service point option under the automation setup rule to select the nearest service point. Please proceed with processing the orders.
 
Regarding your initial query, even though the default service point option is enabled, the customer-selected service point should still be prioritized. If this is not happening, please share the order number where the customer selected a service point but the app selected a different service point. Kindly do not generate the label for that order until we review it.
 
Also, for us to investigate the case and review the logs, we need the Shopify collaborator access request to be approved. We have sent the request to oskari@maustemesta.com.
You can approve it by navigating to: Shopify Settings > Users > Pending Requests > Approve request from info@pluginhive.com
 
Looking forward to your acknowledgment.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Need assistance from the L3 team:

Case: Customer-selected service point is getting overridden when the default service point option is selected in the automation rule.

Details:
The customer is offering PostNord service points on the cart page, allowing customers to select their preferred service point. For orders where no service point is selected, the customer wants the app to automatically select the nearest service point.

Automation rules are configured with the “Default Service Point” option under the automation setup. When customers place orders without selecting a service point, the app correctly selects the nearest service point and generates the label without any problem.

However, when customers place orders with a service point selected, the app overrides the customer-selected service point and instead selects the nearest one. This is not the expected behavior.

When the customer selects a service point during checkout, the label should be generated using the customer-selected service point instead of overriding it with the nearest service point.

Could you please check and provide your input?

Expected Behavior:
- When an order is placed without selecting a service point, the app should automatically select the nearest service point and generate the label.
- When an order is placed with a selected service point, the app should use the customer-selected service point and generate the label accordingly.


Example Order: #33295
Customer-selected service point: 28, Lauttasaarentie, HELSINKI, 00200, FI
App-selected service point: 9, Isokaari, HELSINKI, 00200, FI

Store Details:

- Shopify MCSL app
- Store URL: sxtkhg-n9.myshopify.com
- Account ID:0174da40-6ba1-4686-909d-e1200a7fb721
- $29 Popular plan
- Active from 2025-09-11

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/dm4yK5QObV8SAwO7hnjZaHllP/?name=image.png)
 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/ztwlIztFUlQ7mt9YWRa5bSM19/?name=image.png)
comments.html_body:
Need assistance from the L3 team:
 
Case: Customer-selected service point is getting overridden when the default service point option is selected in the automation rule.
 
Details:
The customer is offering PostNord service points on the cart page, allowing customers to select their preferred service point. For orders where no service point is selected, the customer wants the app to automatically select the nearest service point.
 
Automation rules are configured with the “Default Service Point” option under the automation setup. When customers place orders without selecting a service point, the app correctly selects the nearest service point and generates the label without any problem.
 
However, when customers place orders with a service point selected, the app overrides the customer-selected service point and instead selects the nearest one. This is not the expected behavior.
 
When the customer selects a service point during checkout, the label should be generated using the customer-selected service point instead of overriding it with the nearest service point.
 
Could you please check and provide your input?
 
Expected Behavior:
  • When an order is placed without selecting a service point, the app should automatically select the nearest service point and generate the label.
  • When an order is placed with a selected service point, the app should use the customer-selected service point and generate the label accordingly.
 
Example Order: #33295
Customer-selected service point: 28, Lauttasaarentie, HELSINKI, 00200, FI
App-selected service point: 9, Isokaari, HELSINKI, 00200, FI
 
Store Details:
  • Shopify MCSL app
  • Store URL: sxtkhg-n9.myshopify.com
  • Account ID:0174da40-6ba1-4686-909d-e1200a7fb721

comments.body:
Hello Oskari,

Our team has reviewed this and confirmed that the current behavior (where the nearest service point is selected even when a customer has explicitly chosen one) is a known limitation that will be addressed in an upcoming app release.

We will notify you as soon as the this is live.

Thanks and regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Oskari,
 
Our team has reviewed this and confirmed that the current behavior (where the nearest service point is selected even when a customer has explicitly chosen one) is a known limitation that will be addressed in an upcoming app release.
 
We will notify you as soon as the this is live. 
 
Thanks and regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
